name: Mexican Goolash
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the macaroni to boiling water and cook for 7 minutes.
2. Cook the ground beef, onion, and green pepper in a cast-iron skillet until the meat is brown and vegetables are tender. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Add the tomato juice, cooked macaroni, and spices to the skillet. Simmer until the liquid is almost absorbed.
Note: Served with a salad, this makes a delicious meal.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 323, fat 11g, cholesterol 49mg, carbohydrate 36g, sodium 64mg.
Exchanges: Bread 2, Meat 2, Vegetable 1.
